channel.title: EDGAR Live Scanner — Social
channel.description: Tweet-ready feed of high-signal SEC filings: M&A, activist, tender offers, going-private, strategic reviews, divestitures.

item.title: $SEER 🤝 Merger · Unsolicited Receives unsolicited $2.45/cash + CVR bid from CEO/Chair Farokhzad Omid Farokhzad · cash Mcap $89M · Healthcare
